name: Yasunaga Corporation
summary: Yasunaga Corporation manufactures and sells engine parts and machine tools, and wire saw and electronics systems. It provides automotive and industrial machinery comprising engine parts, such as connecting rods, cylinder heads and blocks, camshafts, and crankshafts; and machine tools, including fracture splitting machines, finishing boring machines, double and single spindle machining centers, transfer machines, micro finishers, and leak testers. The company also offers solar cells, wire saws, and inspection and measuring devices. In addition, it provides environmental equipment that consists of air pumps and disposers for daily life, medical and healthcare, factory and other industrial location, and fish farming and aquarium applications. The company was formerly known as Yasunaga Tekkosho Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yasunaga Corporation in April 1988. Yasunaga Corporation was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Iga, Japan.
